scripts.build: npm run build --prefix admin && rm -rf public dist_production && mkdir -p public/portal dist_production/portal && cp -r admin/dist/. public/portal/ && cp -r admin/dist/. dist_production/portal/ && cp index.html prototype.html roadmap.html echelon-logo-v10.html public/ && cp index.html prototype.html roadmap.html echelon-logo-v10.html dist_production/ && cp -r admin/public/. public/portal/ && cp -r admin/public/. dist_production/portal/ || true
